text: The Azure Grand is a 47-storey luxury tower located in the heart of the financial district, standing as one of the city's most recognisable landmarks since its opening in 2008. The property houses 312 guest rooms and 48 suites, each finished with floor-to-ceiling windows, Italian marble bathrooms, Frette linen, and Nespresso machines. The lobby features a soaring atrium with a three-storey living plant wall and a rotating collection of contemporary art. Guests are welcomed by a 24-hour concierge team fluent in eight languages. The hotel holds a AAA Five Diamond Award for the ninth consecutive year and is a member of the Leading Hotels of the World. Business travellers account for roughly 60 percent of stays, drawn by the 18-room conference centre, state-of-the-art boardrooms, and direct skybridge connection to the convention centre two blocks away. Leisure guests gravitate toward the rooftop infinity pool on the 44th floor and the award-winning Cerulean Spa. The Azure Grand operates on 100 percent renewable electricity and holds LEED Gold certification. Parking is available in a secure underground garage at USD 45 per night for self-park and USD 65 per night for valet.

Sunrise Boutique Resort sits directly on a 600-metre stretch of white sand beach on the northern coastline, a 35-minute drive from the international airport. Originally a colonial-era plantation house built in 1922, the property was sensitively transformed into a 64-room boutique resort in 2015, preserving original teak ceiling beams, antique tiles, and wide verandas while adding contemporary comforts. No room is more than 80 metres from the waterline. The resort has a distinctly unhurried atmosphere with no conference facilities, no live entertainment after 10 pm, and a deliberate absence of televisions in the standard garden rooms to encourage guests to disconnect. Rooms are grouped into three wings: the original Colonial House with 18 rooms, the Garden Villas with 30 rooms, and the five Beachfront Bungalows perched on stilts above the sand. The Bungalows feature private plunge pools, open-air rain showers, and direct beach staircase access. Owner-operated and family-run, the resort is led by the same family that has managed the property since 2015. The on-site restaurant, The Veranda, serves farm-to-table cuisine using produce from the resort's own one-acre kitchen garden and relationships with 12 local fishing families.

Coral Bay Suites is a 92-suite waterfront property occupying a prime headland position overlooking the sheltered waters of Coral Bay. Every suite faces the water, with private balconies offering unobstructed views of the bay and the mangrove-fringed coastline beyond. The property opened in 2011 and underwent a complete interior refurbishment in 2022, emerging with a contemporary coastal palette of bleached oak, stone, and sea glass accents. Suites range from 58 square metres for a Studio Suite to 210 square metres for the signature two-bedroom Headland Suite. Each unit is a self-contained apartment with a fully equipped kitchen including an induction cooktop, dishwasher, and Vitamix blender, making it popular with families and extended-stay guests. The resort's overwater restaurant, Tides, holds a Michelin Bib Gourmand. A fleet of complimentary kayaks, paddleboards, and snorkel equipment is available from the beachside equipment shed between 7 am and 6 pm daily. Coral Bay Suites holds both Green Globe certification and Rainforest Alliance Verified status, reflecting its commitment to marine conservation and zero single-use plastics.

The Pinnacle Hotel is a 38-floor, 428-room full-service hotel in the central business district, connected by an enclosed walkway to the main metro station and within a five-minute walk of six Fortune 500 headquarters. Opened in 1998 and most recently refurbished in 2020, The Pinnacle has been the preferred accommodation address for corporate travellers and government delegations for over two decades. The property features 22 dedicated meeting rooms totalling 3,400 square metres of flexible event space, a grand ballroom accommodating 900 guests for banquet seating, and a dedicated events management team of 14 professionals. Guest rooms begin at 36 square metres and feature ergonomic Herman Miller workstations, dual USB charging hubs, blackout curtains, and walk-in showers. Club Floor guests on levels 32 to 37 receive access to the Club Lounge, which serves continental breakfast from 6:30 am, afternoon tea from 2 pm, and evening cocktails and canapes from 5:30 pm, all included in the room rate. The in-house restaurant, Summit Grill, has been named the city's Best Business Lunch venue for four consecutive years.

Serenity Palms Resort is a purpose-built wellness and beach resort spread across 14 hectares of tropical coastal land on the southern shore, 28 kilometres from the nearest town and surrounded by protected national park. The resort opened in 2017 with a founding philosophy centred on holistic wellbeing, immersive nature experiences, and sustainable tourism. It comprises 78 guest pavilions and seven private pool villas, all constructed from sustainably harvested timber and natural stone on raised platforms to minimise ground disturbance. The architecture channels prevailing sea breezes to reduce air-conditioning dependency, and the resort operates a closed-loop water treatment system recycling 94 percent of grey water. Serenity Palms is known for its Anahata Wellness Centre, a 2,800 square-metre facility offering Ayurvedic treatments, traditional Thai massage, sound healing, breathwork, and a year-round programme of yoga and meditation retreats. The resort's private beach stretches 1.2 kilometres and is accessible exclusively to resort guests. Room occupancy is deliberately capped at 156 guests to preserve an atmosphere of quiet and exclusivity.

The Azure Grand's 312 guest rooms are divided into six categories: Superior at 38 sqm, Deluxe at 45 sqm, Premier at 52 sqm, Executive at 58 sqm, Junior Suite at 72 sqm, and Grand Suite ranging from 110 to 180 sqm. All rooms feature Simmons Beautyrest Black mattresses, 600-thread-count Egyptian cotton sheets, Dyson hairdryers, Bose soundbars, and 65-inch 4K smart televisions. Bathrooms include a double vanity, heated floors, a walk-in rainfall shower, and a separate deep-soaking tub in Premier categories and above. The 44th-floor Cerulean Spa offers 14 private treatment rooms, two couples suites, a hammam, and a cryotherapy chamber. The rooftop infinity pool is 25 metres long, heated to 30 degrees year-round, and surrounded by private cabanas available at USD 75 per half-day inclusive of fruit and two beverages. The Azure Grand's Altitude Bar on the 45th floor is the city's highest licensed venue, carrying over 400 whisky labels and a cocktail programme from three-time national bar champion Elise Fontaine. The bar operates from 4 pm until 1 am daily.

The Pinnacle Hotel's history mirrors the city's commercial evolution. The original 14-floor building opened in 1998 and was expanded to 38 floors following acquisition by the current ownership group in 2004. A USD 120 million refurbishment completed in 2020 modernised all guest rooms, introduced the Summit Grill restaurant, and doubled conference capacity. The lobby's signature feature is a commissioned art installation of 1,200 hand-blown glass spheres that react to ambient sound, shifting from amber to cobalt as noise levels rise. The Pinnacle operates a 24-hour business centre with six private workstations, two printing stations, and complimentary access to Reuters and Bloomberg terminals. Guests enrolled in the PinnacleRewards loyalty programme earn double points on all food, beverage, and spa spend. Express Check-In kiosks on the lobby level allow members to bypass the front desk entirely, receiving a digital room key on their smartphone within seconds of arrival. The hotel maintains a dedicated fleet of three limousines for airport transfers and VIP transport.

The 78 guest pavilions at Serenity Palms Resort are organised across four neighbourhoods: the Beachfront Pavilions with 22 units and direct sand access, Forest Pavilions with 30 units and canopy views, Lagoon Pavilions with 18 units fronting a freshwater lagoon, and seven standalone Pool Villas with private infinity pools and butler service included. Every accommodation includes an outdoor rain shower, a king bed with organic cotton bedding, a curated wellness kit containing a yoga mat, resistance bands, and a guided meditation audio device, and a minibar stocked exclusively with local and organic produce. The resort's culinary programme is led by Chef Manon Charoenwong, whose open-fire restaurant Embers serves a nightly five-course tasting menu drawing on hyperlocal and foraged ingredients. A complimentary morning smoothie station opens at 6 am near the beach, and a communal evening bonfire gathering is held nightly at 8 pm. Each room contains a curated library of books and an audio meditation device; there are no televisions anywhere on the property.

The Azure Grand offers complimentary high-speed fibre Wi-Fi throughout all guest rooms, suites, meeting rooms, restaurants, and public areas, with speeds guaranteed at a minimum of 100 Mbps symmetric. Complimentary breakfast is served daily at Cerulean Kitchen on the 3rd floor: Monday to Friday from 6:30 am to 10:00 am, and Saturday to Sunday from 7:00 am to 11:00 am. The breakfast buffet includes a live egg station, freshly baked pastries, cold-pressed juices, a full continental spread, and a rotating hot section. Room service is available 24 hours a day, seven days a week, with delivery guaranteed within 30 minutes or the order is complimentary. The fitness centre on level 4 is open around the clock and features Technogym cardio equipment, free weights up to 50 kg, and two personal trainers available by appointment at USD 85 per 55-minute session. The Cerulean Spa is open daily from 9 am to 9 pm. Laundry service operates daily with same-day turnaround for items submitted before 9 am; express four-hour service is available at a 50 percent surcharge. Airport transfer by house car costs USD 75 one-way, bookable through the concierge. Complimentary pressing of two garments per stay is available to all guests on request.

Sunrise Boutique Resort provides complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi in all rooms and throughout the resort grounds, including on the beach. Complimentary breakfast is included in every room rate and is served at The Veranda restaurant from 7:00 am to 10:30 am daily, featuring a full buffet with made-to-order eggs, tropical fruit, house-made granola, freshly baked bread, cold-pressed local juices, and barista-prepared coffee. Guests in Beachfront Bungalows receive a complimentary evening sundowner package — a bottle of sparkling wine with a cheese and charcuterie board delivered to their private terrace between 5:30 pm and 6:30 pm. The resort operates two freshwater swimming pools, one adults-only, and a water sports centre offering complimentary snorkelling, kayaking, and stand-up paddleboarding. Guided reef snorkel tours depart at 8 am and 2 pm daily at USD 35 per person. Non-motorised water sports equipment is available free of charge from 7 am to 5:30 pm. Bicycles are available at no charge. A complimentary shuttle departs for the nearest town at 9 am and 3 pm Monday to Saturday. A four-treatment-room spa provides massages, facials, and body scrubs from 9 am to 7 pm, with 24-hour advance booking recommended.

Coral Bay Suites provides complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the property with no speed cap, suitable for video conferencing and large file transfers. A complimentary continental breakfast is included in all room rates and served in the lobby lounge daily from 7:00 am to 10:00 am, featuring artisan pastries, seasonal fruit, yoghurt, cereals, and barista coffee. Full cooked breakfast at Tides restaurant is available at an additional charge of USD 22 per person. The fully equipped kitchens in all suites allow self-catering; a complimentary welcome amenity of fresh milk, orange juice, butter, bread, and local coffee is provided on arrival and replenished on stays of four nights or more. Complimentary equipment from the beachside shed includes kayaks, stand-up paddleboards, snorkels, masks, fins, and life jackets, available from 7 am to 6 pm. A twice-daily housekeeping service is included as standard. The resort provides complimentary cots and highchairs for families with 48-hour advance notice. Complimentary on-site parking is available for all guests. The resort operates an electric buggy transfer service between the main building and the furthest suites, available on request 24 hours a day.

The Pinnacle Hotel provides complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi in all guest rooms and public areas. Business guests have access to a 24-hour business centre offering six private workstations, colour printing, scanning, courier services, and complimentary Bloomberg and Reuters financial terminal access. All guest rooms feature a USB-A and USB-C charging hub at the bedside and a second cluster at the desk. Complimentary breakfast is included for guests on a bed-and-breakfast rate and for all Club Floor guests, served in Summit Grill from 6:30 am to 10:00 am weekdays and 7:00 am to 11:00 am weekends. The fitness centre on level 5 is open 24 hours and includes a heated indoor lap pool measuring 25 metres, a hot tub, sauna, steam room, and fully equipped gym. PinnacleRewards loyalty members receive complimentary room upgrades on check-in subject to availability, complimentary late check-out until 2 pm, and 15 percent off all food and beverage. Express check-in kiosks provide a digital room key within 60 seconds of arrival. Airport limousine transfers are available at USD 90 one-way from a fleet of three dedicated vehicles.

Serenity Palms Resort provides complimentary Wi-Fi in all pavilions and villas, deliberately limited to 25 Mbps to support the resort's digital-detox philosophy while remaining adequate for communication. Complimentary breakfast is included in all room rates and served at Embers from 7:00 am to 10:00 am, featuring an organic buffet of tropical fruits, house-made nut milks, overnight oats, avocado toasts, and an egg station using eggs from the resort's own flock of 40 hens. The Anahata Wellness Centre's daily group yoga at 6:30 am and 5:00 pm and guided meditation at 7:15 am are all included in the room rate. Private sessions with a resident practitioner are available at USD 120 per 75-minute session. All non-motorised water sports including kayaking, paddleboarding, snorkelling, and guided reef walks are complimentary. A complimentary welcome spa ritual — a 60-minute body scrub and foot treatment — is included for all guests on arrival. The 1.2-kilometre private beach is exclusively for resort guests. A nightly bonfire gathering with live acoustic music runs from 8:00 pm. Each room has a curated library and a guided audio meditation device; there are no televisions in any accommodation.

The Azure Grand's Cerulean Spa spans 1,400 square metres on level 5 and comprises 14 private treatment rooms including two couples suites, a Turkish hammam, a cryotherapy chamber, and a heated relaxation lounge. Spa guests receive complimentary access to a thermal circuit — vitality pool, experience shower, sauna, and steam room — with any treatment of 60 minutes or longer. Signature treatments include the Azure Ocean Ritual at USD 280 for 90 minutes, the Blue Jade Massage at USD 195 for 60 minutes, and the Cerulean Couples Journey at USD 520 for two guests over 120 minutes. All products are COSMOS-certified organic. The rooftop infinity pool on the 44th floor is open from 7 am to 10 pm year-round and heated to 30 degrees. Private poolside cabanas for up to six guests are available at USD 75 per half-day or USD 130 per full day, inclusive of fruit, nuts, and two beverages. The Altitude Bar on the 45th floor stocks over 400 whisky labels, 60 gins, and a cocktail programme by three-time national bar champion Elise Fontaine. In-room dining runs 24 hours with a guaranteed 30-minute delivery or the order is complimentary.

The Tides restaurant at Coral Bay Suites is an overwater venue serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner seven days a week. Dinner reservations are strongly recommended and can be made up to 60 days in advance. The Tides sources the majority of its seafood from a small-boat fishing co-operative within 30 kilometres of the resort. The marine activity desk, open from 7 am to 5 pm, organises complimentary guided snorkel tours of the fringing reef at 8:30 am and 1:30 pm daily from the resort's private jetty. PADI Open Water certification courses run over three days at USD 450 per person. Guided two-tank dive excursions cost USD 120 per person. Private sunset sailing cruises on the resort's 38-foot catamaran are available at USD 290 for up to six guests, inclusive of canapes and a bottle of sparkling wine. The Coral Kids Club operates from 9 am to 4 pm daily during school holidays for children aged 4 to 12 at no additional charge. The Aqua Spa offers ocean-inspired treatments seven days a week from 9 am to 7 pm using locally sourced coral extract and sea kelp formulations, with complimentary access to the spa relaxation lounge and outdoor mineral pool included with every treatment.

The Pinnacle Hotel's Summit Grill restaurant is open for breakfast daily from 6:30 am, lunch from noon to 2:30 pm Monday to Friday, and dinner from 6:00 pm to 10:30 pm Monday to Saturday. The restaurant specialises in dry-aged prime beef, with a butcher's cabinet displaying 21-day and 45-day aged cuts on daily rotation. The hotel's 24-hour in-room dining service delivers from the full Summit Grill menu plus a dedicated overnight menu. A grab-and-go cafe adjacent to the lobby, Ground Floor Coffee, opens at 5:30 am for early departures and serves takeaway coffee, pastries, and sandwiches. Complimentary use of the heated indoor pool, sauna, steam room, and fitness centre is available to all guests, with pool towels provided at the fitness centre reception. Two dedicated electric vehicle charging bays in the underground car park are available at no charge for up to eight hours per day. Dry cleaning and pressing runs Monday to Saturday with same-day return for items submitted before 8 am. The concierge desk is staffed 24 hours and provides ticketing for local events, restaurant reservations, tour bookings, and airport transfer coordination.

Stayed in Beachfront Bungalow 3 for seven nights in March with my partner for our tenth anniversary. The description on the website does not do this place justice. Waking up to the sound of waves three metres from your bed and stepping directly onto the sand with a coffee in hand is something I had genuinely never experienced before. The breakfast at The Veranda was outstanding every morning. Staff learned our preferences by day two and began preparing a custom fruit plate with extra mango and no papaya without us needing to ask again. The guided snorkel tour on day three took us to parts of the reef I had never reached on self-guided trips. The private plunge pool in the bungalow held a genuine 39 degrees and the outdoor rain shower under the stars is a memory I will carry for years. The only criticism is that the honesty bar was not restocked after day four until we mentioned it. Otherwise completely flawless. Have already recommended this resort to three friends who are actively planning trips. Rating: 5 out of 5.

I have stayed at over 40 boutique resorts across Southeast Asia and Sunrise is in my personal top three. What sets it apart is a combination of extraordinary beachfront location — you cannot get closer to the water without being in it — and a complete absence of the corporate blandness that affects even well-intentioned boutique brands. This place feels like a family home that happens to have 64 rooms. The owners are present every day; I had a 20-minute conversation about local fishing traditions with the owner on my second evening. The Veranda uses produce from their own kitchen garden and you can taste the difference. The complimentary breakfast was generous enough that I skipped lunch on most days. Wi-Fi was fast and reliable throughout including on the beach, which matters as I was working remotely for part of the stay. The Colonial House rooms are smaller than the Garden Villas but the original architectural details — teak beams, antique floor tiles, wide louvred shutters — more than compensate. No hesitation in recommending to anyone. Rating: 5 out of 5.

Used The Azure Grand for a three-night conference stay and would return for leisure. The Superior room on the 29th floor was compact but efficiently designed. The bed was the best hotel bed I have slept in — the mattress has perfect firmness and the pillow menu with eight options including buckwheat and Hungarian down is something every hotel should offer. Breakfast at Cerulean Kitchen was excellent, though the live egg station had a 12-minute queue on Tuesday morning which was surprising given the buffet's scale. Fitness centre was impeccably maintained and open at 5:30 am when I arrived for an early session. The concierge arranged a restaurant reservation at a popular venue with only four hours notice when I had been told it was booked for three weeks. Location is ideal for the financial district and the skybridge to the convention centre saved 20 minutes each morning. Wi-Fi tested at 220 Mbps. Valet parking retrieved my car within seven minutes both times. Rating: 4.5 out of 5.

We booked a two-bedroom Headland Suite for ten nights with our children aged 8 and 11, and Coral Bay Suites was the best family hotel decision we have ever made. Having a full kitchen changed the holiday entirely — we could prepare breakfast before the restaurant opened, store snacks and drinks, and cook simple dinners on nights we did not want a formal restaurant experience. The kitchen was spotlessly equipped: full-size fridge, induction cooktop, good knives, a Vitamix, and a coffee grinder. The Coral Kids Club kept our children engaged from 9 am every day during the school holiday period and they returned each evening exhausted and happy. Snorkelling from the resort jetty is immediately rewarding — you are on living coral within three minutes of entering the water. Tides restaurant was exceptional for our celebration dinner; the seafood was the freshest I can remember eating anywhere. Complimentary kayaks were in excellent condition. Rating: 5 out of 5.

Mixed experience at Coral Bay Suites. The suite itself was beautiful and the bay views lived up to the photography. We were in a Lagoon Suite on level 2 and the views at sunrise across still water with mist on the headland were extraordinary. The equipment shed was well stocked, staff were helpful, and Tides restaurant deserves its Michelin recognition — we ate there twice and both meals were excellent. However, we encountered operational issues. Our welcome amenity was not in the suite on arrival despite having pre-arranged it, and resolution took nearly 90 minutes. On day five, housekeeping did not service the suite until 4:30 pm. The complimentary continental breakfast required a 20-minute wait for a table on two of five mornings. These are fixable issues and may reflect an unusually busy week, but at this price point they stood out against the physical quality of the property. I would consider returning but expect operational consistency to match the accommodation. Rating: 3.5 out of 5.

The Pinnacle is exactly what a business hotel should be — efficient, comfortable, well-located, and staffed by people who understand what corporate travellers actually need. I stay here four to six times per year and it is consistently among the most reliable hotel experiences I have. Check-in via the kiosk takes under 60 seconds. The room is always clean and quiet. Summit Grill lunch is genuinely good food, not merely acceptable corporate fare — the dry-aged burger is something I request specifically. The Club Floor Lounge access in my company rate makes a real difference: I can work from the lounge in early mornings without losing productivity when rooms are being serviced. The continental breakfast there is substantial enough to replace a formal restaurant meal. The fitness centre has a proper 25-metre lap pool, rare at a business hotel. The 24-hour business centre Bloomberg terminal has saved me on more than one occasion. My only recurring frustration is the valet queue between 7:30 and 9 am which can extend to 15 minutes. Rating: 4.5 out of 5.

I arrived at Serenity Palms burned out and left genuinely restored. That sounds like marketing language but it is an honest description of what six nights with two daily yoga sessions, no television, exceptional food, and a private beach will do. The 6:30 am yoga on the open-sided beach pavilion with the sound of the ocean is the best yoga class I have attended anywhere in 14 years of practice. Chef Manon's tasting menu at Embers uses open fire in extraordinary ways — the smoked beetroot with local curd and fresh herbs was a revelation. The complimentary welcome spa treatment on arrival — a 60-minute body scrub and foot massage — set the tone immediately. The private beach is genuinely exclusive: in six days I counted a maximum of 22 people on it at any one time. The resort's sustainability commitment is real rather than performative: water recycling, composting, solar panels, and the no-plastic policy are integrated into daily operations. The only adjustment was the deliberate Wi-Fi limitation, but by day two I had stopped noticing it entirely. Rating: 5 out of 5.

Stayed in a Beachfront Pavilion for four nights as a solo traveller on a personal wellness retreat. Serenity Palms made me feel safe, welcomed, and genuinely cared for. The resident practitioners in the Anahata Wellness Centre took time before my first session to understand my goals and physical history, and the four-day programme they suggested was perfectly calibrated — challenging enough to create progress, not so intense as to be inaccessible. The private beach is the best I have seen in this region and its exclusivity to resort guests makes a qualitative difference. The morning smoothie station at 6 am before yoga was a small but perfect touch. I ate at Embers every night by choice — unusual for me at a hotel. The nightly bonfire gathering became a genuinely meaningful experience as I had connected with other guests over the week who had come with similar intentions. Choose Beachfront over Lagoon for the sound of the ocean at night. Minor note: mosquitoes are active in the Forest section from around 6 pm; bring your own preferred repellent. Rating: 4.5 out of 5.

Serenity Palms is in many respects exceptional but the pricing does not fully reflect the experience across all room types. We booked a Lagoon Pavilion for five nights based on the photography, which is beautiful. What the photography does not reveal is that the Lagoon Pavilions are adjacent to the service road used for morning kitchen deliveries beginning at 5:45 am, which woke us consistently. The team was apologetic but the Beachfront Pavilions were fully occupied and no move was possible. Meals at Embers were outstanding on every occasion. The Anahata Wellness Centre and yoga programme were exceptional. The beach deserves every superlative applied to it. At rates comparable to top-tier city hotels, however, we expected near-perfection in room placement. The service road proximity is a structural design issue the resort should address. If you book here, specifically request a Beachfront or Forest Pavilion and avoid the Lagoon category entirely. Rating: 3 out of 5 for value, 4.5 out of 5 when the room placement is right.

Coral Bay Suites Cancellation and Reservation Policy. Reservations may be cancelled free of charge up to seven days prior to the scheduled arrival date. Cancellations made between 48 hours and seven days before arrival will incur a charge equal to 50 percent of the first night's room rate. Cancellations made within 48 hours of the scheduled arrival date, or failure to arrive without prior notice, will result in a charge equal to 100 percent of the first night's room rate. For reservations of five or more suites, or stays of 14 nights or longer, a group contract applies with a 30-day free cancellation window and a 50 percent deposit required at the time of booking. Non-refundable promotional rate reservations are charged in full at the time of booking and no refund is available regardless of notice period. All cancellations must be submitted in writing by email to the reservations team; verbal cancellations without written confirmation are not accepted. For bookings made through third-party platforms, the cancellation terms of that platform apply. Check-in time is 3:00 pm. Early check-in from 12:00 pm is available at no additional charge for stays of three nights or more, subject to availability. Check-out is 11:00 am. Late check-out until 2:00 pm is available at a charge of 50 percent of the nightly rate, subject to availability.

The Pinnacle Hotel Cancellation and No-Show Policy. Standard rate reservations may be cancelled without charge up to 72 hours (three full days) prior to the scheduled arrival date. Cancellations received between 24 and 72 hours before arrival will incur a one-night room-and-tax charge. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice, or no-shows, will be charged the full value of the first night's stay including applicable taxes. Non-refundable advance-purchase rates are charged in full at booking and no refund is available under any circumstances. Government and diplomatic rate reservations may be cancelled up to 24 hours before arrival without penalty under the applicable government travel agreement. Group reservations of ten or more rooms are governed by a separate group contract requiring a 50 percent deposit 60 days before arrival and full payment 30 days before arrival. Standard check-in is 3:00 pm and check-out is 12:00 pm noon. Late check-out until 2:00 pm is complimentary for PinnacleRewards Gold and Platinum members. Late check-out until 4:00 pm costs USD 75 for all guests. Early check-in from 8:00 am is available at a half-night charge. Complimentary early check-in from 12:00 pm is subject to availability and cannot be pre-confirmed.

Serenity Palms Resort Reservation, Cancellation, and Stay Policies. Due to the resort's remote location and limited capacity of 78 pavilions, all reservations require full prepayment of the first two nights at the time of booking. Full payment of the balance is due 30 days before arrival. Reservations cancelled 30 or more days before arrival receive a full refund less a 10 percent administration fee. Cancellations made between 14 and 30 days before arrival will forfeit the two-night deposit in full. Cancellations within 14 days of arrival, or no-shows, are charged the full stay amount. The resort strongly recommends comprehensive travel insurance including cancellation cover. Check-in is from 2:00 pm and check-out is by 11:00 am. Guests arriving early are directed to the Arrival Lounge with full access to the beach, restaurant, and wellness centre while rooms are prepared. Late-departure guests may use the beach, pool, and spa changing rooms until 6:00 pm on the day of departure at no additional charge. Serenity Palms Resort is an adults-only property; guests must be 16 years of age or older. The resort is entirely non-smoking. A designated smoking area is available at the arrival court only.

The Azure Grand Guest Policies. Standard rate reservations may be cancelled free of charge up to 48 hours before the scheduled check-in time of 3:00 pm. Cancellations within 48 hours will incur a charge equal to one night's room rate and tax. Non-refundable Advance Purchase rates are charged in full at booking and no refund is available under any circumstances. Check-in is from 3:00 pm and check-out is by 12:00 pm noon. The hotel is pet-friendly, welcoming dogs and cats of up to 25 kg at a fee of USD 50 per pet per night, capped at USD 250 per pet per stay. A pet amenity kit including a bed, food and water bowls, treats, and waste bags is provided on arrival. Pets must be declared at the time of booking. Pets are not permitted in the Cerulean Spa, fitness centre, or any food and beverage venue. The hotel is non-smoking in all indoor spaces. Designated outdoor smoking areas are available on the Level 3 terrace. Quiet hours in all corridors are observed from 10:00 pm to 8:00 am. Damage caused to rooms or hotel property will be charged to the registered credit card at replacement cost. The hotel reserves the right to refuse accommodation to guests whose behaviour is deemed disruptive or a risk to others.

Sunrise Boutique Resort Booking and Stay Policies. Reservations made directly with the resort may be cancelled free of charge up to five days before arrival. Cancellations made two to five days before arrival will incur a charge of one night's room rate. Cancellations within 48 hours of arrival or no-shows will be charged two nights' room rate. Reservations made through online travel agencies are subject to the individual platform's cancellation terms, which may differ from these direct-booking terms. The resort offers a Best Rate Guarantee: if a guest finds a lower rate for the same dates and room type on another platform within 24 hours of direct booking, the resort will match the rate and apply a further 10 percent discount. Check-in is from 2:00 pm and check-out is by 11:00 am. Guests arriving earlier are welcome to store luggage, use the beach and pools, and have breakfast if not already taken. Rollaway beds are available at USD 30 per night; cots for infants are provided free of charge with 48-hour advance notice. The resort is a quiet zone after 10:00 pm with no amplified sound permitted by guests. Sunrise Boutique Resort does not accept pets due to the proximity of a protected sea turtle nesting beach. Smoking is not permitted anywhere within the resort grounds.

The Pinnacle Hotel Pet Policy and Accessibility Statement. The Pinnacle Hotel welcomes well-behaved dogs and cats of any size, subject to a non-refundable deep-cleaning fee of USD 75 per pet per stay. Guests must register pets at check-in and sign the pet policy agreement. Pets must be on a leash in all public areas and are not permitted in Summit Grill, the fitness centre, pool area, or the Club Lounge. Pets may not be left unattended in rooms; a licensed pet-sitting service can be arranged by the concierge from approximately USD 25 per hour. A pet bed and food bowls are provided on request. Damage or extraordinary cleaning costs caused by a pet will be charged at actual cost to the registered credit card. On accessibility: The Pinnacle Hotel is fully ADA-compliant with lift access to all guest floors. Fourteen accessible guest rooms are available across multiple categories, featuring roll-in showers, grab bars, lowered closet rails, and visual fire-alarm strobes. Hearing-impaired kits with a vibrating alarm clock and door-knock alerter are available from the front desk at no charge. A complimentary wheelchair is available from the concierge. Service animals are welcome with no fee. Guests requiring accessibility assistance are encouraged to contact the reservations team in advance so appropriate arrangements can be pre-confirmed.

Sunrise Boutique Resort is situated on the northern coastline, 35 kilometres from the international airport — approximately 35 minutes by car or a 45-minute bus service that departs from the airport transport hub every 90 minutes from 6 am to 10 pm. The resort is on a stretch of coastline designated as a protected marine area, meaning no jet skis or motorised watercraft operate within 500 metres of the beach, contributing directly to the calm and unspoiled character of the water. The nearby village, 8 kilometres south, offers a weekly farmers market on Saturday mornings, independent restaurants, a supermarket, and a pharmacy. The resort's complimentary shuttle departs for the village at 9 am and 3 pm Monday to Saturday. The fringing coral reef begins approximately 80 metres from the shore and is accessible by snorkelling at all tides. A 4-kilometre sealed cycling and running path runs south from the resort entrance along a scenic coastal route. Excursions to three offshore islands, a national park waterfall trek, and elephant sanctuary visits can all be arranged through the activity desk. The resort is one of only three properties on the northern coastline with direct beachfront access.

Serenity Palms Resort occupies a 14-hectare site on the southern shore, surrounded by protected national park on its landward sides and fronting 1.2 kilometres of exclusive beach on its seaward side. The nearest town is 28 kilometres away; the resort is deliberately isolated and this isolation is central to what it offers. The airport is 65 kilometres away, approximately 55 minutes by road. The resort operates a private shuttle between the airport and resort at USD 60 per person one-way, bookable in advance with a minimum of two passengers. The protected national park adjacent to the resort is home to a significant population of hornbills, proboscis monkeys, and saltwater crocodiles in the southern estuary. Guided nature walks into the park depart at 6 am and 4 pm daily at USD 45 per person with a minimum of two guests. Sunrise kayaking through the mangrove channels at USD 55 per person departs at 5:45 am on Tuesdays and Fridays. A full-time registered nurse is on staff and the resort maintains a defibrillator and full first-response medical kit. The nearest hospital with emergency services is 35 kilometres away. The resort's private beach is one of the longest stretches of uninterrupted sand accessible from a single property in the national park region.

The Azure Grand is located at the intersection of Finance Street and Harbour Boulevard in the central business district, eight minutes on foot from the stock exchange, the main courthouse, city hall, and the waterfront promenade. The hotel's underground lobby connects via a covered skybridge to the convention centre two blocks east. Four metro lines are accessible from Central Station 400 metres south, providing connections to the airport in 28 minutes direct, the arts precinct in 12 minutes, and the university district in 18 minutes. The hotel is equidistant between two international airports: the primary hub 28 minutes by metro and a secondary airport 42 minutes by road. Within 500 metres of the hotel there are 14 restaurants, two supermarkets, a pharmacy, and the city's main art gallery. The waterfront promenade, a 3-kilometre pedestrian and cycling path along the harbour, begins 200 metres from the hotel entrance. The nearest beach is 18 kilometres from the hotel, accessible in 25 minutes by car. A florist and 24-hour pharmacy occupy the hotel's retail annex on Harbour Boulevard.

Coral Bay Suites occupies a headland position on the eastern rim of Coral Bay, providing an elevated perspective over the bay and its mangrove foreshore on one side and access to a 200-metre private beach on the other. The resort is 22 kilometres from the regional airport, a 25-minute journey by car. An airport shuttle costs USD 35 per person one-way, bookable through the resort. The township of Coral Bay Village, 4 kilometres north, is accessible by the resort's complimentary bicycle fleet or the resort shuttle departing at 9 am, 1 pm, and 5 pm daily. The village has a weekly fish market on Friday mornings, two independent restaurants, a dive operator, and a general store. The Coral Bay Marine Reserve covering the reef system fronting the resort is rated among the ten best shore-accessible dive sites in the region by three consecutive annual dive magazine rankings. A coastal walking trail from the resort runs north for 6 kilometres to a lighthouse point, offering sea views throughout and regular sightings of nesting seabirds. The nearest hospital with emergency facilities is 28 kilometres from the resort.

The Pinnacle Hotel is located at 1 Commerce Place in the central business district, a three-minute walk from the main metro interchange and connected via an enclosed walkway to the primary metro station. The hotel is directly adjacent to the central law courts and within walking distance of the city's main government buildings and primary commercial retail district. Airport North is 24 minutes by direct metro from Central Station with trains every eight minutes during business hours. Airport South is 38 minutes by road. The hotel is 800 metres from the city's central conference and convention complex. The arts and culture quarter, including the national gallery, main theatre, and principal concert hall, is a 12-minute walk or two-stop metro journey. A 24-hour pharmacy is 150 metres from the hotel's main entrance. The hotel concierge maintains current information on medical professionals and clinics in the area and can arrange prompt assistance. The hotel operates a dedicated rideshare priority lane on Commerce Place with average wait times under three minutes during peak hours.

I had high expectations for The Azure Grand and they were met on almost every dimension. The room on the 32nd floor had an unobstructed harbour view that made the city feel cinematic at night. The bathroom was genuinely luxurious: heated floors, a deep tub one can actually lie in, and a rainfall shower with real pressure. The pillow menu sounds gimmicky but I used it — the buckwheat option was genuinely better than any hotel pillow I have used before. The Cerulean Spa hammam was exceptional, proper traditional technique not a superficial version. The one area below expectations was the complimentary breakfast. For a hotel at this price point the buffet should be outstanding; it was merely good. Pastries were fresh but the egg station on Thursday morning had a visible queue and the station appeared understaffed. I raised this with the guest experience manager and received a genuinely engaged response with a follow-up note under my door that afternoon, which I appreciated. The Altitude Bar is worth the visit for the whisky collection alone. The concierge was exceptional in every interaction. Rating: 4.5 out of 5.

My fourth stay at The Pinnacle in 18 months and the consistency is what earns my continued loyalty. The check-in kiosk works as promised — under 60 seconds from arrival to room key on my phone. Room 2714 had the skyline view I always request and was already at 20 degrees as specified in my profile preferences. Summit Grill continues to be the best business lunch in the city; the 21-day dry-aged ribeye on a wooden board with beef-dripping chips was again outstanding. The Club Lounge in my corporate rate is something I use extensively — working there in early mornings before meetings is more productive than the room. The indoor pool is a genuine 25-metre lap pool and I completed my usual 40 laps before 7 am on both mornings I was here. One observation: the lift bank serving floors 20 to 30 had a noticeable three to four minute wait during the post-dinner peak between 9 and 10 pm. Not a serious issue but noticeable for a property of this calibre. Rating: 4.5 out of 5.

First visit to The Azure Grand and it did not fully deliver on the reputation. The room was excellent — clean, well-maintained, harbour view justifying the floor premium. The Cerulean Spa was world-class; the hot stone massage with the Azure signature oil was the best I have had in this city. However, two issues affected the stay. The advertised 30-minute room service delivery guarantee was not met on two of three occasions we ordered: once 52 minutes with no communication, once 47 minutes. When we raised the guarantee with in-room dining, the response was that the guarantee applies from order acceptance, not from when we placed the call — a distinction the menu should communicate clearly. Second, the corridor outside our room had audible HVAC noise until approximately 1 am on our first night. Engineering resolved it promptly when called but the first night was disrupted. These are operational rather than structural issues and the physical product is genuinely excellent. Rating: 3.5 out of 5.

Third visit to Sunrise Boutique Resort and it remains one of only a handful of places I return to without any desire to try somewhere new. The consistency here is rare in hospitality: the same warmth from largely the same team members, several of whom have been here since our first visit in 2019, the same quality of food, and the same attention to detail throughout. This visit we stayed in a Garden Villa rather than our usual Colonial House room, and the additional space with a private garden and outdoor shower was a genuine step up. The Veranda's weekend brunch has expanded and now includes a build-your-own Bloody Mary station alongside the usual spread, which was a fun addition. The snorkelling from the beach has improved noticeably — a coral restoration programme has clearly progressed, with fish populations I did not encounter on our previous trip. Complimentary Wi-Fi reached our beach spot consistently throughout the stay. The resort shuttle to the village departs exactly on time at every scheduled hour. I can think of no meaningful critique. Rating: 5 out of 5.

The Azure Grand check-in and check-out times. standard check-in is available from 3:00 pm. guests arriving before 3:00 pm are welcome to store luggage with the bell desk and use all hotel facilities including the rooftop pool, cerulean spa, and cerulean kitchen while their room is prepared. early check-in from 12:00 pm noon is available at a half-day rate of usd 75, or complimentary for Grand Suite guests and AzureElite platinum members subject to availability; guests should request early check-in at the time of booking to maximise availability. check-out is by 12:00 pm noon. late check-out until 3:00 pm costs usd 75 and until 6:00 pm costs usd 150, both subject to availability and requested no later than the evening before departure. complimentary late check-out until 2:00 pm is available for AzureElite gold and platinum members on request at check-in. express check-out is available via the guest app or by dropping the room key card in the lobby express box; a folio is sent to the registered email address automatically. guests departing before 6:00 am may request a pre-departure breakfast box from in-room dining the evening before at no additional charge.

Sunrise Boutique Resort check-in and check-out times. check-in is from 2:00 pm daily. guests arriving earlier are warmly welcomed: luggage may be stored securely at the reception desk, and guests are free to use both swimming pools, the beach, and have breakfast at The Veranda if they have not already eaten. early check-in from 12:00 pm is offered at no charge when the room is available, and the team will send a text notification as soon as it is ready. check-out is by 11:00 am. late check-out until 1:00 pm can be requested on the morning of departure and is granted at the team's discretion at no charge when capacity allows; late check-out until 3:00 pm costs the equivalent of half a night's room rate. guests departing after check-out time are welcome to continue using the beach, both pools, and the spa changing facilities until their transport departs. the resort does not operate a formal express check-out; the team prefers a brief personal farewell at the front desk and a folio review to ensure everything was correct. check-in for beachfront bungalows is handled directly at the bungalow by a dedicated host rather than the main reception desk, adding a personal touch from the first moment of arrival.

Coral Bay Suites parking, pet, and general stay policies. complimentary self-parking is available for all guests in the resort's open-air lot immediately adjacent to the main building, with 24-hour security. there is no valet service; the lot is compact and well-signposted from the resort entrance. oversized vehicles and campervans cannot be accommodated. electric vehicle charging is available at two dedicated bays in the car park at no additional charge. the resort does not accept pets, as the coastal wetland habitat adjacent to the property is a protected nesting and foraging area for migratory shorebirds; this policy is strictly enforced with no exceptions, including for emotional support animals. service animals with valid documentation are welcome. the resort is entirely non-smoking indoors; a single designated outdoor smoking area is positioned at the far end of the car park away from guest accommodation. quiet hours are observed from 9:30 pm to 8:00 am throughout all accommodation wings. mobile phone use and amplified personal audio devices are discouraged on the pool deck and beach between 8:00 am and 8:00 pm as a courtesy to other guests. the resort reserves the right to ask guests to reduce noise or relocate if other guests are disturbed.

Serenity Palms Resort pet policy and additional stay policies. Serenity Palms is a pet-free property. the resort's position within a protected national park boundary imposes a strict no-domestic-animal policy, which applies without exception to all pets including dogs, cats, and birds. service animals with official certification may be accommodated by advance written arrangement with the reservations team; guests with service animals must notify the resort at least 14 days before arrival so that appropriate pavilion allocation and any necessary operational adjustments can be made. the resort is completely non-smoking, including all outdoor areas; guests who smoke are asked to do so at the dedicated area near the arrival court only. the resort is an adults-only property and does not accept guests under 16 years of age. serenity palms does not have a traditional car park; a drop-off and collection bay at the resort entrance can hold up to eight vehicles temporarily, but long-term vehicle storage is not available. guests travelling by private car are advised to use the paid secure car storage facility at the town centre 28 kilometres away; the resort's shuttle service operates twice daily between the facility and the resort at no additional charge for guests who have pre-booked vehicle storage.

The Azure Grand parking, transport, and concierge services. the hotel's secure underground car park on levels B1 and B2 offers 180 spaces with self-park available at usd 45 per night and valet parking at usd 65 per night; both options include in-and-out privileges. electric vehicle charging is available at 12 dedicated bays on level B1 at no surcharge. airport transfers are available 24 hours by house limousine at usd 75 one-way to the primary airport (28 minutes) and usd 95 one-way to the secondary airport (42 minutes), bookable through the concierge or via the guest app up to 30 minutes before departure. the concierge team, staffed around the clock with eight languages represented, provides theatre, concert, and sporting event ticketing; fine dining restaurant reservations including at sold-out venues through standing relationships; private tour bookings; florist and gift arrangement; private jet and yacht charter coordination; dry cleaning collection from rooms; and same-day courier dispatch. a dedicated shopping concierge is available for personal shopping in the city's luxury retail quarter, 600 metres from the hotel. the concierge team also manages the hotel's fleet of three bicycles, available complimentary for up to four hours per day per guest for exploring the waterfront promenade.

The Azure Grand fitness centre, pool, and wellness facilities. the fitness centre on level 4 is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week, and requires only a room key for access at any hour. the facility features 18 Technogym cardio machines including treadmills, ellipticals, and stationary bikes with integrated screens, a full free-weight section with dumbbells from 2 to 50 kg, cable machines, squat racks, and a dedicated stretching and functional training zone with TRX suspension rigs. two certified personal trainers are available by appointment from 6:00 am to 9:00 pm at usd 85 per 55-minute session. the rooftop infinity pool on the 44th floor is open daily from 7:00 am to 10:00 pm and maintained at 30 degrees celsius year-round. the pool is 25 metres in length and accompanied by a shallow lounge area, private heated cabanas, and a full pool-deck beverage service from 10:00 am. the cerulean spa is open daily from 9:00 am to 9:00 pm. the spa thermal circuit — heated vitality pool, experience shower, sauna, and steam room — is accessible to all guests free of charge between 9:00 am and 1:00 pm each morning without a treatment booking. children under 16 are not permitted in the fitness centre, spa, or rooftop pool.

Sunrise Boutique Resort pools, fitness, and transport services. the resort operates two freshwater swimming pools: the main pool adjacent to The Veranda restaurant is open to all guests from 7:00 am to 9:00 pm, and the adults-only infinity pool at the northern garden edge is open from 7:00 am to 9:00 pm for guests 18 and over. both pools are unheated but maintain comfortable temperatures throughout the season. complimentary pool towels are available from the towel station beside each pool; guests are asked to return towels at the end of each use. there is no formal fitness centre or gym on the property; the resort instead encourages activity through the twice-daily complimentary beach yoga sessions at 7:30 am, the 4-kilometre coastal cycling route, and a dedicated stretch lawn facing the ocean equipped with yoga mats, blocks, and foam rollers available at all hours. complimentary bicycles are available from the activities desk from 7:00 am to 6:00 pm, with helmets provided. the resort's complimentary shuttle to the village departs at 9:00 am and 3:00 pm monday to saturday from the main entrance and returns at 11:30 am and 5:30 pm. airport transfers to the international airport (35 km) are available through the resort's partner taxi service at approximately usd 40 per car one-way, bookable at the front desk.

Sunrise Boutique Resort room service, dining hours, and guest services. the resort does not operate a traditional 24-hour room service. in-villa dining is available for all Beachfront Bungalow guests from 7:00 am to 9:30 pm, with a curated menu of light meals, snacks, fresh juices, and cocktails; orders placed after 9:30 pm are limited to a late-night menu of antipasti, cheese, bread, and bottled beverages delivered by the night team. garden villa and colonial house room guests are served through The Veranda restaurant, which operates for breakfast from 7:00 am to 10:30 am, lunch from 12:30 pm to 2:30 pm, and dinner from 6:30 pm to 9:30 pm daily. the bar at The Veranda remains open until 11:00 pm. a 24-hour honesty bar stocked with soft drinks, beer, wine, and spirits is located in the colonial house common room and operates on a self-service honour system charged to the room. the activities desk is open from 7:30 am to 6:00 pm and coordinates snorkel tours, reef excursions, cycling, and off-property day trips. the spa is open from 9:00 am to 7:00 pm with advance booking recommended. the front desk is staffed 24 hours for any urgent guest needs.

Coral Bay Suites pool, fitness, and guest activity facilities. the resort's main outdoor infinity pool overlooks the bay and is open daily from 7:00 am to 9:00 pm for all guests. the pool is 20 metres in length, unheated but warm year-round given the tropical climate, and features a shallow entry ledge and a separate children's wading area at the northern end. complimentary pool towels are available from the rack at the pool entrance. a poolside snack and drinks service operates from 10:00 am to 6:00 pm. Coral Bay Suites does not have a traditional hotel gym, but a fully equipped fitness room on the ground floor of the main building is available to all guests around the clock, featuring two treadmills, a stationary bike, a cable machine, free weights up to 30 kg, and a yoga/stretch mat area. the aqua spa mineral pool adjacent to the main building is open from 7:30 am to 7:30 pm for guests who have booked a spa treatment that day; day access to the mineral pool without a treatment costs usd 20 per person. the beachside water sports shed is open from 7:00 am to 6:00 pm for complimentary kayak, paddleboard, and snorkel equipment. guided snorkel tours depart from the jetty at 8:30 am and 1:30 pm daily.

Coral Bay Suites room service, concierge, and transport. in-room dining at Coral Bay Suites operates from 7:00 am to 10:00 pm daily and draws from The Tides restaurant menu as well as a dedicated suite dining selection featuring casual options. orders can be placed by phone or via the in-suite tablet. deliveries are made to the suite door or, for suites with a private terrace, laid out on the terrace table on request. a light overnight room service is available from 10:00 pm to 7:00 am for guests who require it, limited to items that travel well: cheeseboards, fruit, biscuits, hot beverages, and a selection of cold drinks. the fully equipped kitchens in all suites mean many guests choose to self-cater for some meals; the resort's concierge can arrange grocery delivery from the village general store with two hours notice during business hours. the resort concierge team, available from 7:00 am to 9:00 pm, arranges dive excursions, catamaran sunset cruises, day trips to nearby islands, restaurant bookings in Coral Bay Village, airport transfers, and car hire. airport shuttle to the regional airport (22 km) departs at scheduled times twice daily at 9:00 am and 2:00 pm and costs usd 35 per person one-way; private car transfers are available 24 hours at usd 80 per vehicle.

Coral Bay Suites children and family facilities. Coral Bay Suites is one of the most family-friendly resorts in the region, designed from the outset to accommodate families with children of all ages. the Coral Kids Club is a supervised activities programme for children aged 4 to 12, operating from 9:00 am to 4:00 pm daily during designated school holiday periods and on weekends year-round at no additional charge to guests. the programme includes marine education sessions, guided beach hunts, craft activities using natural materials, junior snorkel lessons in the shallow water near the jetty, and sandcastle competitions with prizes. all Kids Club staff hold current first aid and child protection certifications. the resort provides complimentary baby cots, highchairs, bottle warmers, and children's bath products on request with 48-hour advance notice. a selection of children's pool floaties, arm bands, and beach toys is available from the water sports shed. the shallow children's wading pool adjacent to the main infinity pool provides a safe and supervised splash area for toddlers. families staying in Headland Suites or two-bedroom suites may request a nanny or babysitting service arranged through the concierge at approximately usd 18 per hour through a registered local provider.

The Pinnacle Hotel parking, transport, and airport connections. the hotel operates a 220-space secure underground car park with self-parking at usd 35 per night and valet parking at usd 55 per night; both options include unlimited in-and-out access. monthly parking contracts are available for extended-stay guests at a reduced rate. four electric vehicle charging stations are available on level B1 at no additional charge for hotel guests. airport connections are provided by a dedicated fleet of three executive limousines, each accommodating up to four passengers with luggage; the fare is usd 90 one-way to Airport North (24 minutes) and usd 130 one-way to Airport South (38 minutes). shared airport shuttle departures operate at 5:30 am, 7:30 am, 9:30 am, 12:00 pm, 3:00 pm, and 6:00 pm from the hotel main entrance at usd 28 per person to Airport North. the metro station enclosed walkway from the hotel provides an independent and cost-effective airport connection at a fraction of the private transfer cost. the hotel maintains an account with three rideshare and taxi providers; the concierge can have a vehicle at the hotel entrance in under three minutes during business hours. the concierge also coordinates helicopter transfers for guests requiring connections to the secondary airport or private terminals.

The Pinnacle Hotel fitness centre, pool, and wellness facilities. the fitness centre on level 5 is fully equipped and open 24 hours a day to all hotel guests at no additional charge. it features 20 Precor cardio machines, a full free-weight section with dumbbells from 2 to 45 kg, plate-loaded barbells and squat racks, cable machines, and a functional training zone. two certified personal trainers are available for appointments from 6:00 am to 8:00 pm at usd 95 per 60-minute session; sessions must be booked through the concierge or fitness reception the day before. the heated 25-metre indoor lap pool is open from 6:00 am to 10:00 pm daily and maintains a constant temperature of 28 degrees celsius; lane ropes are in place and the pool is typically uncrowded before 8:00 am and after 8:00 pm, making it ideal for serious swimmers. a hot tub seating 10 guests, a Finnish sauna, and a steam room adjoin the pool area and are open during the same hours. pool and gym towels are provided at the fitness reception; a water cooler and complimentary fruit are available throughout the day. a spa and wellness room on level 5 offers sport massage and recovery treatments from 7:00 am to 8:00 pm by appointment at usd 110 per 60-minute session.

The Pinnacle Hotel children, family, and concierge services. while primarily a business hotel, The Pinnacle Hotel accommodates families with a range of thoughtful provisions. complimentary baby cots and highchairs are available on request with 24-hour notice. a children's menu is available in Summit Grill and through in-room dining. the concierge team can arrange babysitting services through a vetted local provider at approximately usd 22 per hour, subject to availability. the Club Lounge on levels 32 to 37 is open to adults only; families with children are served the same continental breakfast in Summit Grill at no additional charge when on a bed-and-breakfast rate. the concierge team of eight specialists is available from 7:00 am to 11:00 pm and provides theatre and concert ticketing; restaurant reservations across the city; private city tours; corporate gift sourcing; local medical referrals; private driver bookings; secretarial support including translation and printing; and coordination of audio-visual and event requirements for meetings. a dedicated business concierge is available exclusively for guests hosting events or meetings on the property. the PinnacleRewards desk adjacent to the main concierge operates from 8:00 am to 8:00 pm for loyalty account queries and upgrades.

Serenity Palms Resort pool, fitness, and transport details. the resort's main freshwater swimming pool is located at the centre of the beachfront pavilion precinct and is open to all guests from 6:30 am to 9:00 pm daily. the pool is 18 metres long, maintained at a natural ambient temperature, and surrounded by sun loungers, shade structures, and a juice bar open from 8:00 am to 5:00 pm. the seven private pool villas each have their own infinity plunge pool open at the guest's discretion. serenity palms does not operate a traditional hotel gym; consistent with the wellness philosophy, the resort provides structured movement through twice-daily complimentary yoga at 6:30 am and 5:00 pm, guided meditation at 7:15 am, and a range of nature-based activities. a functional movement studio adjacent to the anahata wellness centre offers body-weight training equipment, resistance bands, TRX suspension trainers, and balance boards for independent use from 6:00 am to 8:00 pm at no charge. the resort's airport shuttle operates between the resort and the airport (65 km, 55 minutes) twice daily at 7:30 am and 2:30 pm for scheduled departures, and on-demand at usd 60 per person one-way for guests with outside-schedule flights; the shuttle requires a minimum of two passengers or a private vehicle surcharge of usd 80 applies.

Serenity Palms Resort room service, dining, and concierge services. room service at Serenity Palms is available from 6:30 am to 10:00 pm daily and draws from both the breakfast menu and a curated all-day dining selection. after 10:00 pm a night menu of light items — fruit, yoghurt, house-made granola bars, herbal teas, and warm honey milk — can be ordered and delivered within 20 minutes. the morning smoothie station near the beach operates from 6:00 am, providing complimentary green, fruit, and protein smoothies for early risers before the main restaurant opens. the embers restaurant serves the complimentary breakfast buffet from 7:00 am to 10:00 am and a nightly five-course tasting menu from 7:30 pm to 9:30 pm; lunch is not formally served but a light grazing table of salads, cold dishes, and fresh fruit is available in the poolside pavilion from 12:00 pm to 3:00 pm. the resort concierge team, available from 7:00 am to 9:00 pm, coordinates all nature excursions, including sunrise mangrove kayaking, guided park walks, and wildlife boat tours; arranges spa and wellness programme bookings; handles airport shuttle reservations; and assists with any special occasion arrangements including anniversary dinners on the beach, private bonfires, and personalised wellness programme design.

Serenity Palms Resort wifi details and digital connectivity. Serenity Palms provides complimentary Wi-Fi in every pavilion, villa, and public area of the resort. in keeping with the resort's wellness and digital-detox philosophy, connection speeds are intentionally capped at 25 Mbps download and 10 Mbps upload — adequate for messaging, email, video calls, and streaming music, but not optimised for large file transfers or high-definition video streaming. guests who require higher bandwidth for work purposes are advised to contact reservations before arrival; the pool villas can be configured with a dedicated uncapped connection for an additional usd 15 per day on request. the resort does not provide in-room televisions, gaming consoles, or business workstations. a small library of films is available on a complimentary USB drive on request for guests who wish to watch content offline on their own devices. the resort's digital-detox programme, available as an optional add-on, includes a lockable phone pouch and a curated schedule of activities designed to replace screen time with nature engagement; participants report it as one of the most popular add-ons. despite the capped speeds, connectivity is reliable throughout the property including on the private beach.

Sunrise Boutique Resort parking and vehicle information. Sunrise Boutique Resort provides complimentary surface-level parking for all guests in a shaded lot immediately east of the main colonial house building. the lot accommodates up to 35 vehicles and is secured by a gate operated by security from 8:00 pm to 7:00 am. there is no valet service, but the lot is a short walk from all room categories. electric vehicle charging is available at two standard outlets in the car park; guests with EVs should bring their own adapter cable as the resort provides only a type-2 socket. there is no additional charge for EV charging. the nearest petrol station is 8 kilometres south toward the village. given the resort's beachfront location, guests are encouraged to arrive by road rather than attempt any coastal access route, and the management requests that guests driving 4WD vehicles remain on sealed roads as off-road access adjacent to the turtle nesting beach is prohibited. for guests arriving without a car, the airport bus service (35 km, approximately 45 minutes) operates every 90 minutes from the airport transport hub and stops at the village junction 2 kilometres from the resort; the resort offers a complimentary pickup from the village junction with advance notice of arrival time.

Sunrise Boutique Resort children and family services. Sunrise Boutique Resort warmly welcomes families and is well-suited to guests travelling with children of all ages. the property does not operate a formal kids club but the resort's relaxed beach setting and array of complimentary activities create a naturally engaging environment for young guests. complimentary baby cots are available in all garden villa and colonial house rooms on request with 24-hour advance notice; beachfront bungalows accommodate a cot in the main sleeping area. highchairs are available in The Veranda restaurant. the beach and pool areas are supervised by resort staff from 8:00 am to 6:00 pm; children under 12 in the pool areas must be accompanied by an adult at all times. a children's snorkel kit in junior sizes is available from the water sports centre. the Veranda restaurant provides a dedicated children's menu at both lunch and dinner. the resort's kitchen garden has a small children's patch and guided garden tours for young guests can be arranged through the activities desk. babysitting services are available through a recommended local provider at approximately usd 15 per hour; the front desk can make an introduction with 24-hour advance notice. the one guest category not suited to very young infants is the beachfront bungalow, where the open ocean staircase requires care.

Sunrise Boutique Resort pet policy and concierge services. Sunrise Boutique Resort does not accept pets of any kind. the resort borders a protected sea turtle nesting beach under active conservation management, and the presence of domestic animals — including dogs, even on leads — poses a documented risk to nesting turtles and hatchlings. this policy applies year-round without exception, including to small pets, emotional support animals, and caged birds. service animals with official certification may be accommodated with advance written arrangement; please contact reservations at least 14 days before arrival so that a suitable room away from nesting areas can be allocated and the conservation team notified. the resort's concierge services, provided by the front desk team from 7:00 am to 10:00 pm, include activity bookings for reef snorkel tours, offshore island excursions, elephant sanctuary half-days, national park waterfall treks, and private fishing trips with local captains; restaurant reservations in the village; airport taxi coordination; laundry and dry cleaning collection from rooms; and arrangement of in-room celebration packages including flowers, champagne, and custom cakes baked by the on-site pastry chef. the concierge team speaks English, Thai, and Mandarin and can arrange translation into additional languages through a partner service.

The Pinnacle Hotel check-in, check-out, and parking summary. standard check-in time is 3:00 pm. the Pinnacle's express check-in kiosks in the lobby allow PinnacleRewards members to collect a digital room key within 60 seconds of arrival, bypassing the front desk entirely; standard guests may use the front desk, which is staffed 24 hours. early check-in from 12:00 pm is complimentary for PinnacleRewards Gold and Platinum members subject to availability; for all other guests, early check-in from 8:00 am incurs a half-night room charge. standard check-out is 12:00 pm noon. late check-out until 2:00 pm is complimentary for PinnacleRewards Gold and Platinum members; all other guests may request late check-out until 2:00 pm for usd 50 or until 4:00 pm for usd 75, subject to room availability and requested by 9:00 am on the day of departure. the underground car park offers 220 spaces: self-park at usd 35 per night, valet at usd 55 per night. overnight parking is billed per 24-hour period from check-in time. day parking for non-resident guests attending meetings is usd 12 for up to four hours and usd 22 for a full day. the hotel operates a 24-hour reception and concierge service and guests may leave luggage with the bell desk after check-out at no charge.

The Azure Grand wifi, children, and family services. complimentary high-speed fibre Wi-Fi is provided throughout all guest rooms, suites, meeting rooms, the cerulean spa, the rooftop pool deck, cerulean kitchen, the altitude bar, and all public areas. connection speeds are guaranteed at a minimum of 100 Mbps symmetric, and in practice most rooms test between 180 and 250 Mbps. there is no bandwidth cap and the network supports simultaneous streaming, video conferencing, and large uploads from multiple devices without throttling. the guest Wi-Fi network is segmented from the hotel's corporate network for security. families travelling with children are well accommodated: complimentary baby cots for infants and rollaway beds for children aged 3 to 12 are available on request with 48-hour advance notice at no additional charge. highchairs are available in cerulean kitchen and at any table in the hotel's dining areas. a children's menu is offered at cerulean kitchen and via in-room dining. the rooftop pool is accessible to children under 16 when accompanied by a parent or guardian; the pool is shallow-ended at 1.2 metres and deep-ended at 1.8 metres. the cerulean spa and fitness centre are restricted to guests aged 16 and over. the concierge can arrange babysitting through a vetted local service at approximately usd 25 per hour.

Coral Bay Suites check-in, check-out, and wifi details. check-in at Coral Bay Suites is from 3:00 pm. guests arriving before this time may store luggage at reception and are welcome to access the pool, beach, water sports shed, and lobby lounge. early check-in is available from 12:00 pm at no charge for stays of three nights or more, subject to room availability; for shorter stays, early check-in from 12:00 pm costs usd 40. check-out is by 11:00 am. late check-out until 1:00 pm is available at no charge on request, subject to availability; late check-out until 2:00 pm costs 50 percent of the nightly room rate and must be requested by 9:00 am on the day of departure. complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi is provided throughout the resort with no speed cap. the network has been designed to support multiple simultaneous streams per suite, and guests regularly use the connection for video conferencing and remote work from the suites' dedicated workspace areas. the Wi-Fi password is provided on the in-suite welcome card and can be reset by calling the front desk. there is no charge for any Wi-Fi use and no bandwidth limit applies. connectivity extends to the pool deck, The Tides restaurant, the lobby lounge, and the beachside area adjacent to the equipment shed.

The Azure Grand room service and breakfast details. in-room dining at The Azure Grand operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, serving the full cerulean kitchen menu from 6:30 am to 10:30 am and then a comprehensive all-day and late-night menu for the remainder of the day and night. the 30-minute delivery guarantee applies to all orders placed to guest rooms: if delivery takes longer than 30 minutes from the time the order is confirmed by the kitchen, the entire order is complimentary. orders are placed by phone, via the guest app, or via the in-room tablet. a next-day continental room service breakfast can be pre-ordered on the in-room card the night before, with delivery at a chosen 15-minute window for a quieter start without placing a live order. the complimentary breakfast at cerulean kitchen on the 3rd floor is included in the room rate for all room categories and runs monday to friday from 6:30 am to 10:00 am and saturday to sunday from 7:00 am to 11:00 am. the buffet features a live egg and omelette station, a freshly baked pastry and bread section, cold cuts, artisan cheeses, tropical and seasonal fruits, house-made granola and muesli, yoghurt and acai bowls, and a rotating hot section that changes daily. freshly squeezed juices and barista coffee are included. a la carte additions such as eggs benedict, avocado toast, and smoked salmon plates are available from the menu at a supplement.

Serenity Palms Resort family policy and children. Serenity Palms Resort is an adults-only property and does not accept guests under the age of 16 years. this policy exists to preserve the atmosphere of quiet, restoration, and immersive nature engagement that defines the resort experience. guests must be 16 or older at the time of check-in; guests who arrive and do not meet the age requirement will be unable to check in and no refund will be provided for cancellations made after the standard policy window. the resort does not offer babysitting services or children's activity programmes, as these are inconsistent with the adults-only designation. guests in the private pool villas who wish to celebrate a family occasion with adult children aged 16 and over are warmly accommodated. for families travelling with younger children, the resort's reservations team is happy to suggest alternative family-friendly properties in the region. the wellness centre, yoga programme, and all other facilities are available to all guests aged 16 and over without restriction. the resort reports that its adults-only designation is among the most frequently cited reasons guests choose to book, as it directly contributes to the consistent atmosphere of calm that reviewers describe.

The Azure Grand cancellation policy and booking terms. standard rate reservations may be cancelled free of charge up to 48 hours before the scheduled check-in time of 3:00 pm local time. a cancellation made within 48 hours of arrival will incur a charge equal to one full night's room rate plus applicable taxes, billed to the credit card on file. no-shows are charged one night's room rate and tax, and the reservation is automatically released at 8:00 am the following morning unless the guest notifies the hotel before midnight on the arrival date. non-refundable advance purchase rate reservations are charged in full at the time of booking; no refund is available under any circumstances, including illness, flight cancellation, or force majeure, and the hotel strongly recommends that guests booking these rates obtain comprehensive travel insurance including cancellation cover. group bookings of five or more rooms are governed by a separate group contract with modified deposit and cancellation terms — typically a 30-day cancellation window and a 25 percent deposit due at booking. cancellation requests must be submitted in writing by email or through the guest app; telephone cancellations are accepted for immediate acknowledgement but must be followed by written confirmation. modification of arrival dates on standard rates is treated as a cancellation of the original reservation and a new booking.
